---
title: "Sir Richard Edward Rowley Martin"
---

## Sir Richard Edward Rowley Martin

**Dates:** (1847-1907)

### Description

British Commissioner in Swaziland, 1890–95; Deputy Commissioner and Commandant-General British Protectorate and Rhodesia, 1896–98. He was created KCB 1898; KCMG 1895. [WWW]

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, April 14th [?1899]](../letters/3404_To_Mary_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
